note: v378: Hiding a section now also strips it from the Home page. Turning off Invoices/Customers or Expenses hides the matching stat cards, the Expenses dashboard group (Cash Flow, Spend This Month, Spending by Category), the Recent lists, and filters those items out of the Upcoming card and Calendar. Cash Flow (income vs expenses) hides if either side is off. Extends the Settings → Sections toggles; no new migration.
